# All Measures
```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ==============================
# LIBRARIES
# ==============================
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(DT)
library(htmltools)
library(shiny)
library(fontawesome)
library(stringr)
library(readxl)
library(writexl)
library(commonmark)

# ==============================
# LOAD DATA
# ==============================
mr21    <- read_xlsx("Codebook/MR21_codebook.xlsx")
maxed   <- read_xlsx("Codebook/maxed_codebook.xlsx")
powered <- read_xlsx("Codebook/powered_codebook.xlsx")

# ==============================
# CLEANING FUNCTIONS
# ==============================
format_measure <- function(x) {
  x %>%
    str_replace_all("_", " ") %>%
    str_squish() %>%
    str_to_upper()
}

# ==============================
# RECODE MAP
# Keys must be in POST-format form (uppercase, no underscores, squished),
# because format_measure() runs BEFORE recode() in clean_codebook().
# ==============================
recode_auto <- c(
  "BIS BAS"                          = "BIS/BAS",
  "FADE"                             = "FADE/FAMB",
  "FOMP"                             = "FADE/FAMB",
  "MMQ"                              = "MINI MENSTRUAL QUESTIONNAIRE",
  "BFNES"                            = "BRIEF FEAR OF NEGATIVE EVALUATION SCALE",
  "DIAMOND SUMMARY"                  = "DIAMOND",
  "DCF"                              = "DATA COLLECTION FORM",
  "EDE"                              = "EATING DISORDER EXAMINATION",
  "CSSRS"                            = "COLUMBIA SUICIDE SEVERITY RATING SCALE",
  "DFM"                              = "DRIVE FOR MUSCULARITY",
  "CET" = "COMPULSIVE EXERCISE TEST", 
  "EDS"                              = "EXERCISE DEPENDENCE SCALE",
  "IUS-SF"                           = "INTOLERANCE OF UNCERTAINTY-SHORT FORM",
  "IUS-S"                            = "INTOLERANCE OF UNCERTAINTY-SHORT FORM",
  "AED"                              = "ANALOGOUS EXERCISE DECISIONS",
  "EFQ"                              = "EATING FEARS QUESTIONNAIRE",
  "EQF"                              = "EATING FEARS QUESTIONNAIRE",
  "EATING FEARS QUESTIONNAIRE (EFQ)" = "EATING FEARS QUESTIONNAIRE", 
  "ART" = "ATHLETES' RELATIONSHIP WITH TRAINING SCALE", 
  "MINI MENTAL STATE EXAM MMSE"   = "MINI MENTAL STATE EXAM", 
  "MCI" = "MENSTRUAL CYCLE INFORMATION", 
  "EPSI" = "EATING PATHOLOGY SYMPTOMS INVENTORY", 
  "PDS" = "PUBERTAL DEVELOPMENTAL SCALE", 
  "SATAQ" =  "SOCIOCULTURAL ATTITUDES TOWARDS APPEARANCE QUESTIONNAIRE", 
  "NVS MID" = "NVS (PRE/MID/POST)", 
  "NVS PRE" = "NVS (PRE/MID/POST)",
  "NVS POST" = "NVS (PRE/MID/POST)", 
  "PVS PRE" = "PVS (PRE/POST)",
  "PVS POST" = "PVS (PRE/POST)", 
  "INTERVIEW 847A79" = "POWERED WEIGHT HISTORY INTERVIEW", 
  "INTERVIEW"= "POWERED WEIGHT HISTORY INTERVIEW", 
  "GFFS" = "GOLDFARB FEAR OF FAT SCALE", 
  "GAD-7" = "GENERALIZED ANXIETY DISORDER 7-ITEM SCALE",
  "PHQ" = "PATIENT HEALTH QUESTIONNAIRE 9-ITEM", 
  "FMPS" = "FROST MULTIDIMENSIONAL PERFECTIONISM SCALE",
  "DERS" = "DIFFICULTIES IN EMOTION REGULATION SCALE",  
  "POTS" = "PERCEPTIONS OF TEASING SCALE", 
  "FUNCTION OF EXERCISE" = "FADE/FAMB"
)

# ==============================
# MEASURE DESCRIPTIONS
# Each measure has its own .md file in Codebook/descriptions/.
# Filename = lowercased measure name with non-alphanumerics replaced by "_".
# To add/edit a description, just create/edit that file — no R changes needed.
# ==============================
descriptions_dir <- "Codebook/descriptions"

measure_to_filename <- function(measure_name) {
  key <- format_measure(measure_name)
  key <- tolower(key)
  key <- str_replace_all(key, "[^a-z0-9]+", "_")
  key <- str_replace_all(key, "^_+|_+$", "")
  file.path(descriptions_dir, paste0(key, ".md"))
}

get_description <- function(measure_name) {
  path <- measure_to_filename(measure_name)
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    return(sprintf(
      "<em style='color:#888;'>No description yet. Create <code>%s</code> to add one.</em>",
      htmltools::htmlEscape(path)
    ))
  }
  md <- paste(readLines(path, warn = FALSE, encoding = "UTF-8"), collapse = "\n")
  commonmark::markdown_html(md)
}

# ==============================
# APPLY CLEANING
# ==============================
clean_codebook <- function(df, project_name) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      Measure = as.character(Measure),
      Measure = format_measure(Measure),
      Measure = recode(Measure, !!!recode_auto),
      Project = project_name
    )
}

mr21_clean    <- clean_codebook(mr21,    "MR21")
maxed_clean   <- clean_codebook(maxed,   "MAXED")
powered_clean <- clean_codebook(powered, "POWERED")

# ==============================
# COMBINE DATA
# ==============================
comparison1 <- bind_rows(maxed_clean, mr21_clean, powered_clean)

# ==============================
# VARIABLE-LEVEL SHARING INFO
# ==============================
var_projects <- comparison1 %>%
  distinct(Variable, Project) %>%
  group_by(Variable) %>%
  summarise(
    VarProjects     = paste(sort(unique(Project)), collapse = " "),
    VarProjectCount = n_distinct(Project),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    VarShared = case_when(
      VarProjectCount == 3 ~ "shared-all",
      VarProjectCount == 2 ~ "shared-two",
      TRUE                 ~ "unique"
    )
  )

# ==============================
# MEASURE-LEVEL SHARING INFO
# ==============================
measure_projects <- comparison1 %>%
  distinct(Measure, Project) %>%
  group_by(Measure) %>%
  summarise(
    MeasureProjects = paste(sort(unique(Project)), collapse = " "),
    MeasureCount    = n_distinct(Project),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ==============================
# JOIN BACK
# ==============================
comparison1 <- comparison1 %>%
  left_join(var_projects,     by = "Variable") %>%
  left_join(measure_projects, by = "Measure")

# ==============================
# BADGE HELPER
# ==============================
make_project_badges <- function(projects_string) {
  projects <- unlist(strsplit(as.character(projects_string[1]), " "))
  badges <- c(
    if ("MAXED"   %in% projects) "<span class='badge maxed'>MAXED</span>"     else "",
    if ("MR21"    %in% projects) "<span class='badge mr21'>MR21</span>"       else "",
    if ("POWERED" %in% projects) "<span class='badge powered'>POWERED</span>" else ""
  )
  paste(badges[nchar(badges) > 0], collapse = "")
}

measure_badge_df <- measure_projects %>%
  mutate(MeasureBadges = vapply(MeasureProjects, make_project_badges, character(1)))

# ==============================
# OPTIONAL: print measures missing description files
# ==============================
measure_list <- sort(unique(comparison1$Measure))
missing_descriptions <- measure_list[
  !file.exists(vapply(measure_list, measure_to_filename, character(1)))
]
if (length(missing_descriptions) > 0) {
  message("Measures still missing description files:\n  - ",
          paste(missing_descriptions, collapse = "\n  - "))
}

# ==============================
# CSS
# ==============================
css <- HTML("
<style>
  body { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; }

  /* Description block */
  .measure-description {
    background: #f8f9fa;
    border-left: 3px solid #339AF0;
    padding: 12px 16px;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.55;
    color: #343a40;
    border-radius: 4px;
  }
  .measure-description p              { margin: 0 0 8px 0; }
  .measure-description p:last-child   { margin-bottom: 0; }
  .measure-description h1,
  .measure-description h2,
  .measure-description h3,
  .measure-description h4 {
    margin: 10px 0 6px 0;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #212529;
  }
  .measure-description ul,
  .measure-description ol             { margin: 4px 0 8px 20px; padding: 0; }
  .measure-description li             { margin-bottom: 2px; }
  .measure-description code {
    background: #e9ecef;
    padding: 1px 5px;
    border-radius: 3px;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-family: ui-monospace, Menlo, Consolas, monospace;
  }
  .measure-description blockquote {
    border-left: 3px solid #adb5bd;
    margin: 6px 0;
    padding: 2px 10px;
    color: #555;
    font-style: italic;
  }
  .measure-description a              { color: #1971c2; text-decoration: underline; }

  /* Search bar */
  .search-bar {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  #search-input {
    flex: 1;
    max-width: 360px;
    padding: 6px 10px;
    border: 1px solid #ced4da;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-size: 13px;
  }
  #search-input:focus {
    outline: none;
    border-color: #339AF0;
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(51,154,240,0.2);
  }
  .clear-search-btn {
    border: none;
    background: #868e96;
    color: white;
    padding: 6px 10px;
    border-radius: 6px;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 12px;
  }

  /* Project badges */
  .badge {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 3px 8px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    color: white;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-left: 3px;
  }
  .badge.maxed   { background-color: #FF922B; }
  .badge.mr21    { background-color: #339AF0; }
  .badge.powered { background-color: #9B59B6; }

  /* Row colours */
  tr.shared-all td { background-color: #e8f5e9; }
  tr.shared-two td { background-color: #fff8e1; }
  tr.unique     td { background-color: #fce4ec; }

  /* Filter buttons */
  .filter-bar, .var-filter-bar {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 6px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .filter-bar { margin-bottom: 4px; }
  .filter-btn {
    border: none;
    padding: 6px 14px;
    border-radius: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer;
    opacity: 0.35;
    transition: all 0.18s ease-in-out;
  }
  .filter-btn.active {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1.06);
    box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
  }
  .filter-btn.maxed   { background-color: #FF922B; color: white; }
  .filter-btn.mr21    { background-color: #339AF0; color: white; }
  .filter-btn.powered { background-color: #9B59B6; color: white; }
  .filter-btn.reset   { background-color: #868e96; color: white; opacity: 0.8; }
  .filter-btn.reset:hover { opacity: 1; }

  #active-filter-summary { margin-bottom: 10px; font-size: 12px; color: #555; min-height: 22px; }

  .var-filter-btn {
    border: none;
    padding: 5px 12px;
    border-radius: 12px;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 12px;
    cursor: pointer;
    opacity: 0.4;
    transition: all 0.18s ease-in-out;
  }
  .var-filter-btn.active {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1.06);
    box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
  }
  .var-filter-btn.all-vars       { background-color: #868e96; color: white; }
  .var-filter-btn.shared-all-btn { background-color: #43a047; color: white; }

  .legend { font-size: 11px; color: #555; margin-bottom: 14px; }
  .legend span {
    display: inline-block; width: 12px; height: 12px;
    border-radius: 3px; margin-right: 4px; vertical-align: middle;
  }
  .leg-all  { background-color: #c8e6c9; }
  .leg-two  { background-color: #fff9c4; }
  .leg-uniq { background-color: #f8bbd0; }

  /* Measure blocks */
  details.measure-block {
    border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
    border-radius: 8px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }
  details.measure-block > summary {
    padding: 10px 14px;
    cursor: pointer;
    list-style: none;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
    background: #f8f9fa;
    border-radius: 8px;
    user-select: none;
  }
  details.measure-block > summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
  details.measure-block[open] > summary {
    border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6;
  }
  .measure-count { font-size: 11px; color: #888; margin-left: 4px; }
  .details-content { padding: 12px; }
  .shared-measure-badge {
    font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700;
    padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 8px; color: white;
  }
  .shared-measure-badge.shared-all { background: #43a047; }
  .shared-measure-badge.shared-two { background: #f9a825; }
  .shared-measure-badge.unique     { background: #e53935; }

  table.dict-table {
    width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 13px;
  }
  table.dict-table th {
    padding: 6px 10px; text-align: left;
    background: #f1f3f5; font-weight: 700;
    border-bottom: 2px solid #dee2e6;
  }
  table.dict-table td { padding: 5px 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; }
</style>
")

# ==============================
# FILTER CONTROLS + JS
# ==============================
filter_controls <- HTML("
<!-- SEARCH BAR -->
<div class='search-bar'>
  <strong style='font-size:13px;'>Search:</strong>
  <input type='text' id='search-input' placeholder='Search variable name, label, or measure...' oninput='applyFilters()'>
  <button class='clear-search-btn' onclick='clearSearch()'>Clear</button>
</div>

<!-- PROJECT FILTER -->
<div class='filter-bar'>
  <strong style='margin-right:4px; font-size:13px;'>Filter by project:</strong>
  <button id='btn-maxed'   class='filter-btn maxed'   onclick='toggleProject(\"MAXED\")'>MAXED</button>
  <button id='btn-mr21'    class='filter-btn mr21'    onclick='toggleProject(\"MR21\")'>MR21</button>
  <button id='btn-powered' class='filter-btn powered' onclick='toggleProject(\"POWERED\")'>POWERED</button>
  <button id='btn-reset'   class='filter-btn reset'   onclick='resetAll()'>&#x21BA; Reset</button>
</div>

<div id='active-filter-summary'><em>Showing all projects</em></div>

<div class='var-filter-bar'>
  <strong style='margin-right:4px; font-size:13px;'>Show:</strong>
  <button id='vbtn-all'    class='var-filter-btn all-vars active' onclick='filterVar(\"ALL\")'>All Variables</button>
  <button id='vbtn-shared' class='var-filter-btn shared-all-btn'  onclick='filterVar(\"SHARED\")'>&#x2713; Shared Variables</button>
</div>

<div class='legend'>
  Row colours &nbsp;
  <span class='leg-all'></span> Variable in all 3 projects &nbsp;
  <span class='leg-two'></span> Variable in 2 projects &nbsp;
  <span class='leg-uniq'></span> Variable unique to 1 project
</div>

<script>
var selectedProjects = [];
var activeVar = 'ALL';

function toggleProject(project) {
  var idx = selectedProjects.indexOf(project);
  var btnId = 'btn-' + project.toLowerCase();
  if (idx === -1) {
    selectedProjects.push(project);
    document.getElementById(btnId).classList.add('active');
  } else {
    selectedProjects.splice(idx, 1);
    document.getElementById(btnId).classList.remove('active');
  }
  updateSummary();
  applyFilters();
}

function resetAll() {
  selectedProjects = [];
  activeVar = 'ALL';
  document.getElementById('search-input').value = '';
  document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn').forEach(function(b) { b.classList.remove('active'); });
  document.querySelectorAll('.var-filter-btn').forEach(function(b) { b.classList.remove('active'); });
  document.getElementById('vbtn-all').classList.add('active');
  updateSummary();
  applyFilters();
}

function clearSearch() {
  document.getElementById('search-input').value = '';
  applyFilters();
}

function updateSummary() {
  var el = document.getElementById('active-filter-summary');
  if (selectedProjects.length === 0) {
    el.innerHTML = '<em>Showing all projects</em>';
    return;
  }
  var colorMap = { MAXED: '#FF922B', MR21: '#339AF0', POWERED: '#9B59B6' };
  var pills = selectedProjects.map(function(p) {
    return '<span style=\"display:inline-block;background:' + colorMap[p] +
           ';color:white;border-radius:10px;padding:2px 9px;' +
           'font-size:11px;font-weight:700;margin-right:4px;\">' + p + '</span>';
  }).join('');
  el.innerHTML = 'Showing: ' + pills;
}

function filterVar(level) {
  activeVar = level;
  document.querySelectorAll('.var-filter-btn').forEach(function(b) { b.classList.remove('active'); });
  var vmap = { 'ALL': 'vbtn-all', 'SHARED': 'vbtn-shared' };
  document.getElementById(vmap[level]).classList.add('active');
  applyFilters();
}

function applyFilters() {
  var searchTerm = (document.getElementById('search-input').value || '').toLowerCase().trim();

  document.querySelectorAll('.measure-block').forEach(function(block) {
    var mProjects   = (block.getAttribute('data-projects') || '').split(' ');
    var measureName = (block.getAttribute('data-measure-name') || '').toLowerCase();

    var measureProjOk = selectedProjects.length === 0 ||
                        selectedProjects.some(function(p) { return mProjects.indexOf(p) !== -1; });

    if (!measureProjOk) {
      block.style.display = 'none';
      return;
    }

    var measureNameMatches = searchTerm === '' || measureName.indexOf(searchTerm) !== -1;
    var visibleCount = 0;

    block.querySelectorAll('tr[data-varshared]').forEach(function(row) {
      var vProjects = (row.getAttribute('data-varprojects') || '').split(' ').filter(Boolean);

      var rowProjOk = selectedProjects.length === 0 ||
                      selectedProjects.some(function(p) { return vProjects.indexOf(p) !== -1; });

      var rowVarOk = true;
      if (activeVar === 'SHARED') {
        if (selectedProjects.length >= 2) {
          rowVarOk = selectedProjects.every(function(p) { return vProjects.indexOf(p) !== -1; });
        } else {
          rowVarOk = vProjects.length >= 2;
        }
      }

      var rowSearchOk = true;
      if (searchTerm !== '' && !measureNameMatches) {
        var cells = row.querySelectorAll('td');
        var variableText = (cells[0] ? cells[0].textContent : '').toLowerCase();
        var labelText    = (cells[1] ? cells[1].textContent : '').toLowerCase();
        rowSearchOk = variableText.indexOf(searchTerm) !== -1 ||
                      labelText.indexOf(searchTerm) !== -1;
      }

      var show = rowProjOk && rowVarOk && rowSearchOk;
      row.style.display = show ? '' : 'none';
      if (show) visibleCount++;
    });

    block.style.display = visibleCount > 0 ? '' : 'none';

    if (searchTerm !== '' && visibleCount > 0) {
      block.setAttribute('open', '');
    }
  });
}
</script>
")

# ==============================
# BUILD MEASURE SECTIONS
# ==============================
measure_sections <- lapply(measure_list, function(measure_name) {

  vars       <- comparison1 %>% filter(Measure == measure_name)
  badge_row  <- measure_badge_df %>% filter(Measure == measure_name)
  badge_html <- if (nrow(badge_row) > 0) badge_row$MeasureBadges[1] else ""
  mc         <- if (nrow(badge_row) > 0) badge_row$MeasureCount[1]  else 1

  shared_label <- if (mc == 3) "shared-all" else if (mc == 2) "shared-two" else "unique"
  shared_text  <- if (mc == 3) "All 3 projects" else if (mc == 2) "2 projects" else "1 project"
  shared_badge <- sprintf("<span class='shared-measure-badge %s'>%s</span>",
                          shared_label, shared_text)

  n_vars      <- n_distinct(vars$Variable)
  count_label <- sprintf("<span class='measure-count'>(%d variables)</span>", n_vars)

  vars_tbl  <- vars %>% select(Variable, Label, Value, Project, VarShared, VarProjects)
  rows_html <- apply(vars_tbl, 1, function(row) {
    proj_badges <- make_project_badges(row[["VarProjects"]])
    sprintf(
      "<tr class='%s' data-varshared='%s' data-varprojects='%s'>
         <td>%s</td><td>%s</td><td>%s</td><td>%s</td><td>%s</td>
       </tr>",
      row[["VarShared"]], row[["VarShared"]], row[["VarProjects"]],
      htmltools::htmlEscape(row[["Variable"]]),
      htmltools::htmlEscape(row[["Label"]]   %||% ""),
      htmltools::htmlEscape(row[["Value"]]   %||% ""),
      htmltools::htmlEscape(row[["Project"]]),
      proj_badges
    )
  })
  rows_html <- paste(rows_html, collapse = "\n")

  tbl_html <- sprintf(
    "<div style='overflow-x:auto;'>
       <table class='dict-table'>
         <thead>
           <tr><th>Variable</th><th>Label</th><th>Value</th><th>Project</th><th>In Projects</th></tr>
         </thead>
         <tbody>%s</tbody>
       </table>
     </div>",
    rows_html
  )

  # Build the description block (markdown -> HTML), then prepend it to the table
  desc_html <- sprintf(
    "<div class='measure-description'>%s</div>",
    get_description(measure_name)
  )

  tags$details(
    class               = "measure-block",
    `data-projects`     = paste(sort(unique(na.omit(vars$Project))), collapse = " "),
    `data-measure-name` = measure_name,
    tags$summary(
      HTML(paste0(
        "<strong>", htmltools::htmlEscape(measure_name), "</strong>",
        " ", badge_html, " ", shared_badge, " ", count_label
      ))
    ),
    tags$div(
      class = "details-content",
      HTML(paste0(desc_html, tbl_html))
    )
  )
})

# ==============================
# FINAL OUTPUT
# ==============================
tagList(
  css,
  filter_controls,
  tagList(measure_sections)
)
```
